---
name: Bug report
about: Report a non-security bug.
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What Happened

Describe the behavior you saw.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what you expected instead.

## Reproduction

Include commands, config shape, fixture names, or links to public evidence.
Do not include credentials, private registry records, tokens, or deployment
secrets.

## Environment

Mention the Registry Stack version or commit, operating system, Rust version,
and any relevant feature flags.
